name: Jax the Quick-Hacker
backstory: Jax used to work for a big company until he stole some secret mind-codes and ran away! Now the bad guy guards are chasing him, and his digital ghost leaves sparkly trails wherever he goes.
special: Overclock hack: Bonus action, double prof on tech check (1/short rest)

name: Vira the Star Mage
backstory: Vira was sent away from her home for learning strange star magic. Now a dream about a glowing dragon pulls her toward the center of the universe — and she can't ignore it!

name: Krag the Robot Smasher
backstory: Krag grew up fighting in the underground battle arenas. A mysterious voice promised him endless adventures — and a real chance to be free!
special: Overcharge smash: +1d6 dmg next attack (1/short rest)

name: Lena the Healing Hero
backstory: Lena is a brave doctor who heals people in the glowing streets of the big city. A patient once whispered a secret with their last breath: 'The dragon's heart is at the center of everything.'
special: Neural mend: Heal 1d8 + wis mod HP (1/short rest)

name: Zeth the Shadow Jumper
backstory: Zeth is a sneaky treasure hunter who can slip through tiny holes in reality. He once stole a shiny scale from a sleeping dragon — now the dragon's mind follows his every move!

name: Grom the Shield Giant
backstory: Grom was born in the fiery forges and carries a shield as big as a door! He feels the ground shake and knows his hammer is meant to protect his friends from the great beast.
special: Shield wall: Temp HP = level x 5 (1/short rest)
